meta.name: Generate conference synthetic personas with Slack, Gemini and Salesforce

parameters.responseBody: =🧬 Generating Digital Doppelgängers for *{{ $json.body.text }}*... This may take a minute.

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: =SELECT FirstName, LastName, Title, Account.Name, Account.Industry, MailingCity, MailingCountry FROM CampaignMember WHERE Campaign.Name = '{{ $('Parse Command Args').item.json.eventName }}'

parameters.text:
=✅ *Digital Doppelgänger Report Complete!*

🧬 Generated and auto-interviewed *{{ $('Parse Command Args').item.json.personaCount }}* synthetic personas for *{{ $('Parse Command Args').item.json.eventName }}*
📊 Data source: {{ $('Parse Command Args').item.json.crmSource }}

📋 *14 structured questions per persona covering:*
  • Content & Format (3 questions)
  • Logistics & Experience (3 questions)
  • Networking & Meetings (3 questions)
  • ROI & Decision-Making (3 questions)
  • Wildcard Insights (2 questions)

💬 *Want to dig deeper?* Reply in any persona card's thread with follow-up questions.

_Powered by Braia Labs | Digital Doppelgänger Engine_

parameters.content:
## Digital Doppelgänger — Persona Generator

### **What it does:**
Generates AI-powered synthetic personas (Digital Doppelgängers) from your CRM attendee data that event teams can interview before the event — shifting from post-event measurement to pre-event prediction.

### **Why it matters:**
VOK DAMS' Digital Doppelgänger concept lets you test event concepts, content strategies, and networking formats against realistic audience archetypes BEFORE committing resources. Predict what works instead of measuring what didn't.

### **How it works:**
1. Team runs `/doppelganger "Event Name" 5 hubspot` in Slack
2. Workflow fetches attendee data from CRM (HubSpot, Salesforce, or Google Sheets)
3. Gemini AI analyzes audience segments and generates synthetic personas
4. Each persona is posted as a rich card to Slack
5. Each persona is auto-interviewed with 14 structured questions across 5 categories
6. Full interview reports are posted to Slack
7. Team can still reply in persona threads for deeper follow-up questions

### **Setup steps:**
1. Connect **Slack** OAuth2 credential
2. Connect **Google Gemini** API credential
3. Configure CRM credentials (HubSpot API key, Salesforce OAuth, or Google Sheets)
4. Create a Google Sheet with tabs: `Personas` and `Conversations` — update the Sheet ID placeholder
5. Update the audience Google Sheets ID placeholder if using Sheets as CRM data source
6. Register the `/doppelganger` slash command in your Slack app settings
7. Set the slash command URL to this webhook's production URL

## 1. Slack Slash Command

Receives `/doppelganger` command with args:
- **Event name** (quoted if spaces)
- **Persona count** (3-10, default 5)
- **CRM source** (`hubspot`, `salesforce`, `sheets`)

Acknowledges immediately (Slack 3s timeout) then processes async.

## 2. CRM Data Fetch

Routes to the correct CRM API based on source parameter:
- **HubSpot** — Contact search by event tag
- **Salesforce** — SOQL query on CampaignMember
- **Google Sheets** — Direct read (CSV import fallback)

All sources are normalized to a common format for AI analysis.

## 3. AI Persona Engine

Google Gemini Flash Lite clusters attendee data into distinct archetypes and generates detailed synthetic personas with:
- Motivations, pain points, decision style
- Budget authority, networking preferences
- Content format preferences
- Likely objections and engagement predictions

**GDPR Safe:** All personas are synthetic — no real PII is reproduced.

## 4. Store & Deliver

Each persona is:
1. Stored in the `Digital Doppelgängers` Google Sheet (Personas tab)
2. Formatted as a rich Slack Block Kit card
3. Posted to the requesting channel

Interview conversations are also logged to the Conversations tab.

## 5. Structured Auto-Interview

Each persona is automatically interviewed with **14 questions** across 5 categories:

| Category | Questions | Covers |
|---|---|---|
| **Content & Format** | Q1-Q3 | Session types, topics, depth |
| **Logistics & Experience** | Q4-Q6 | Schedule, venue, hybrid |
| **Networking & Meetings** | Q7-Q9 | Who to meet, formats, value |
| **ROI & Decision-Making** | Q10-Q12 | Justification, success, objections |
| **Wildcard** | Q13-Q14 | Pain points, ideal experience |

Full reports are posted to Slack automatically — no manual questioning needed.
